word: H7911 - שָׁכַח - shâkach - shaw-kakh' - [idiom] at all

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁכח שׁכח

Transliteration: shâkach shâkêach

Phonetic: shaw-kakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to forget, ignore, wither
    1. (Qal)
      1. to forget
      2. to cease to care
    2. (Niphal) to be forgotten
    3. (Piel) to cause to forget
    4. (Hiphil) to make or cause to forget
    5. (Hithpael) to be forgotten

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2383

Part(s) of speech: Verb
